mapper.select: SELECT ct.tag_name FROM content_tag_relation ctr JOIN content_tag ct ON ct.id = ctr.tag_id WHERE ctr.content_id = #{contentId} AND ct.status = 1 ORDER BY ct.use_count DESC, ct.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE content SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET favorite_count = favorite_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET favorite_count = GREATEST(favorite_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
